step_rationale: Omega-3 PUFA with anti-inflammatory and anti-thrombotic properties; plaque-stabilizing marker.
mechanism: Eicosapentaenoic acid, an omega-3 polyunsaturated fatty acid, associates with plaque stability and suppresses thromboxane-driven platelet aggregation.

references.title: Lipidomic Expression Analysis in Carotid Atherosclerotic Disease: A Systematic Review.

trials.title: Study of the Effect of Eicosapentaenoic Acid (EPA) on Markers of Atherothrombosis in Patients With Type-2 Diabetes
